queries.question: Give me the name of the gates at each boarding area.
queries.sql: SELECT Gates.gateName  from Boarding_Areas_Gates join Gates on Boarding_Areas_Gates.gateId = Gates.gateId join Boarding_Areas on Boarding_Areas_Gates.areaId = Boarding_Areas.areaId   GROUP BY Boarding_Areas_Gates.gateId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Boarding_Areas_Gates.areaId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Boarding_Areas)

queries.question: Give me the name of the gates at each boarding area.
queries.sql: select boarding_areas.areaid , gates.gatename from Boarding_Areas_Gates join Gates on Boarding_Areas_Gates.gateId = Gates.gateId join Boarding_Areas on Boarding_Areas_Gates.areaId = Boarding_Areas.areaId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?areaid ?gatename WHERE {
  ?boarding_areas_gates a :Boarding_Areas_Gates .
  ?gates a :Gates .
  ?boarding_areas_gates p:hasGates ?gates .
  ?boarding_areas a :Boarding_Areas .
  ?boarding_areas_gates p:hasBoarding_Areas ?boarding_areas .
  ?boarding_areas p:areaId ?areaid .
  ?gates p:gateName ?gatename .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the name of the gates at each boarding area.
